problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
hypothesis: Combining Ketamine-like NMDA antagonism without dissociation with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
